caption:
FREE Ben & Jerry’s Ice Cream Cone on April 14th! 

Just go to any Ben & Jerry’s location on April 14th & get a free ice cream cone with no purchase necessary🍦

#food #free #foodie #benandjerrys

transcription.text: Ben & Jerry's is handing out free ice cream with no purchase necessary. Just go to Ben & Jerry's on April 14th and they'll give you an ice cream cone completely for free.
